title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on The Pallikonda Co-operative Urban Bank Limited, Tamil Nadu
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated March 09, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand only) on The Pallikonda Co-operative Urban Bank Limited, Tamil Nadu (the bank) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy - Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks (UCBs)’ and ‘Exposure Norms and Statutory / Other Restrictions – UCBs’.
